Device ID.name: WHO_AM_I
Device ID.description: Who_AM_I register (r). This register is a read-only register. Its value is fixed at 69h.

fields.name: WHO_AM_I
fields.description: Device ID

fields.name: FUNC_CFG_ACCESS
fields.description: Function configuration access

fields.name: THRESHOLD
fields.description: Significant motion threshold

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: XL_BW_SCAL_ODR
fields.description: Accelerometer bandwidth selection. Default value: 0

fields.name: SLEEP_G
fields.description: Gyroscope sleep mode enable. Default value: 0

fields.name: INT2_on_INT1
fields.description: All interrupt signals available on INT1 pad enable. Default value: 0

enum_values.0: interrupt signals divided between INT1 and INT2 pads
enum_values.1: all interrupt signals in logic or on INT1 pad

fields.name: FIFO_TEMP_EN
fields.description: Enable temperature data as 4th FIFO data set. Default: 0

enum_values.0: disable temperature data as 4th FIFO data set
enum_values.1: enable temperature data as 4th FIFO data set

fields.name: DRDY_MASK
fields.description: Configuration 1 data available enable bit. Default value: 0

fields.name: I2C_DISABLE
fields.description: Disable I2C interface. Default value: 0

fields.name: STOP_ON_FTH
fields.description: Enable FIFO threshold level use. Default value: 0.

enum_values.1: FIFO depth is limited to threshold level

fields.name: DEB_TIME
fields.description: If this time between steps is greater than DEB_TIME*80ms, the debouncer is reactivated

fields.name: DEB_STEP
fields.description: Minimum number of steps to increment step counter (debouncer)

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ROUNDING
fields.description: Circular burst-mode (rounding) read from output registers. Default: 000

fields.name: ST1_G
fields.description: Self test bit

fields.name: ST0_G
fields.description: Self test bit

fields.name: ST1_XL
fields.description: Self test bit

fields.name: ST0_XL
fields.description: Self test bit

fields.name: DELTA
fields.description: Step count delta

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: TRIG_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope data edge-sensitive trigger enable

fields.name: LVL_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope data level-sensitive trigger enable

fields.name: LVL2_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope level-sensitive latched enable

fields.name: XL_HM_MODE
fields.description: High-performance operating mode disable for accelerometer

Embedded Functions.name: TAP_CFG
Embedded Functions.description: Time stamp, pedometer, tilt, filtering, and tap recognition functions configuration register (r/w)

fields.name: TIMER_EN
fields.description: Time stamp count enable. 0: time stamp count disabled; 1: time stamp count enabled

fields.name: PEDO_EN
fields.description: Pedometer algorithm enable. 0: pedometer algorithm disabled; 1: pedometer algorithm enabled

fields.name: TILT_EN
fields.description: Tilt calculation enable. 0: tilt calculation disabled; 1: tilt calculation enabled

fields.name: SLOPE_FDS
fields.description: Enable accelerometer HP and LPF2 filters. 0: disable; 1: enable

fields.name: TAP_X_EN
fields.description: Enable X direction in tap recognition. 0: X direction disabled; 1: X direction enabled

fields.name: TAP_Y_EN
fields.description: Enable Y direction in tap recognition. 0: Y direction disabled; 1: Y direction enabled

fields.name: TAP_Z_EN
fields.description: Enable Z direction in tap recognition. 0: Z direction disabled; 1: Z direction enabled

fields.name: LIR
fields.description: Latched Interrupt. 0: interrupt request not latched; 1: interrupt request latched

fields.name: FIFO_CTRL1
fields.description: FIFO control 1 settings

fields.name: RSVD_5_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: TIMER_PEDO_FIFO_EN
fields.description: Enable pedometer step counter and time stamp. Default: 0 (0: disable step counter and time stamp data; 1: enable step counter and time stamp data.)

enum_values.0: disable step counter and time stamp data
enum_values.1: enable step counter and time stamp data

fields.name: TIMER_PEDO_FIFO_DRDY
fields.description: FIFO write mode. Default: 0 (0: enable write in FIFO based on XL/Gyro data-ready; 1: enable write in FIFO at every step detected by step counter.)

enum_values.0: enable write in FIFO based on XL/Gyro data-ready
enum_values.1: enable write in FIFO at every step detected by step counter

fields.name: FTH_11
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH10
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_9
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: FTH_8
fields.description: FIFO threshold level setting. Default value: 0000 Watermark flag rises when the number of bytes written to FIFO after the next write is greater than or equal to the threshold level. Minimum resolution for the FIFO is 1LSB = 2 bytes (1 word) in FIFO

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DEC_FIFO_GYRO
fields.description: Gyro FIFO (first data set) decimation setting. Default: 000

fields.name: DEC_FIFO_XL
fields.description: Accelerometer FIFO (second data set) decimation setting. Default: 000

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD_2_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ONLY_HIGH_DATA
fields.description: 8-bit data storage in FIFO. Default: 0 (0: disable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro; 1: enable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro in FIFO)

enum_values.0: disable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro
enum_values.1: enable MSByte only memorization in FIFO for XL and Gyro in FIFO

fields.name: TIMER_PEDO_DEC_FIFO
fields.description: Third FIFO data set decimation setting. Default: 000 For the configuration setting, refer to Table 29 . These bits are used when the bit TIMER_PEDO_FIFO_EN is set to '1' in FIFO_CTRL2 (07h)

enum_values.0b000: Third FIFO data set not in FIFO

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ODR_FIFO
fields.description: FIFO ODR selection, setting FIFO_MODE also. Default: 0000

enum_values.0b0001: FIFO ODR is set to 13 Hz
enum_values.0b0010: FIFO ODR is set to 26 Hz
enum_values.0b0011: FIFO ODR is set to 52 Hz
enum_values.0b0100: FIFO ODR is set to 104 Hz
enum_values.0b0101: FIFO ODR is set to 208 Hz
enum_values.0b0110: FIFO ODR is set to 416 Hz
enum_values.0b0111: FIFO ODR is set to 833 Hz
enum_values.0b1000: FIFO ODR is set to 1.66 kHz
enum_values.0b1001: FIFO ODR is set to 3.33 kHz
enum_values.0b1010: FIFO ODR is set to 6.66 kHz

fields.name: FIFO_MODE
fields.description: FIFO mode selection bits, setting ODR_FIFO also. Default value: 000

enum_values.0b001: FIFO mode. Stops collecting data when FIFO is full.
enum_values.0b011: Continuous mode until trigger is deasserted, then FIFO mode.
enum_values.0b100: Bypass mode until trigger is deasserted, then Continuous mode.
enum_values.0b110: Continuous mode. If the FIFO is full, the new sample overwrites the older one.

Interrupts.name: FUNC_SRC

fields.name: RSVD_2_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: STEP_COUNT_DELTA_IA
fields.description: Pedometer step recognition on delta time status. 0: no step recognized during delta time; 1: at least one step recognized during delta time

fields.name: SIGN_MOTION_IA
fields.description: Significant motion event detection status. 0: significant motion event not detected; 1: significant motion event detected

fields.name: TILT_IA
fields.description: Tilt event detection status. 0: tilt event not detected; 1: tilt event detected

fields.name: STEP_DETECTED
fields.description: Step detector event detection status. 0: step detector event not detected; 1: step detector event detected

fields.name: STEP_OVERFLOW
fields.description: Step counter overflow status. 0: step counter value < 2^16 ; 1: step counter value reached 2^16

fields.name: INT1_INACT_STATE
fields.description: Routing on INT1 of inactivity mode. Default: 0

fields.name: INT1_TILT

fields.name: INT1_TIMER
fields.description: Routing of end counter event of timer on INT1. Default value: 0

Gyroscope.name: ORIENT_CFG_G
Gyroscope.description: Angular rate sensor sign and orientation register

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: SIGNX_G
fields.description: Pitch axis (X) angular rate sign. Default value: 0

fields.name: SIGNY_G
fields.description: Roll axis (Y) angular rate sign. Default value: 0

fields.name: SIGNZ_G
fields.description: Yaw axis (Z) angular rate sign. Default value: 0

fields.name: ORIENT
fields.description: Directional user-orientation selection. Default value: 000

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: G_HM_MODE
fields.description: High-performance operating mode disable for gyroscope. Default: 0 (0: high-performance operating mode enabled; 1: high-performance operating mode disabled)

fields.name: HP_G_EN
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter enable. Default value: 0 (0: HPF disabled; 1: HPF enabled)

fields.name: HPCF_G1
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection bit 1

fields.name: HPCF_G0
fields.description: Gyroscope high-pass filter cutoff frequency selection bit 0

fields.name: HP_G_RST
fields.description: Gyro digital HP filter reset. Default: 0 (0: gyro digital HP filter reset OFF; 1: gyro digital HP filter reset ON)

enum_values.0: gyro digital HP filter reset OFF

fields.name: ROUNDING_STATUS
fields.description: Source register rounding function enable on STATUS_REG (1Eh), FUNC_SRC (53h) and WAKE_UP_SRC (1Bh) registers. Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

Tap/Wakeup.description: Portrait/landscape position and tap function threshold register (r/w)

fields.name: D4D_EN
fields.description: 4D orientation detection enable (Z-axis position detection is disabled). Default value: 0 (0: disabled; 1: enabled)

fields.name: SIXD_THS
fields.description: Threshold for D6D function. Default value: 00

fields.name: TAP_THS
fields.description: Threshold for tap recognition. Default value: 00000

fields.name: DUR
fields.description: Duration of maximum time gap for double tap recognition. Default: 0000

fields.name: QUIET
fields.description: Expected quiet time after a tap detection. Default value: 00

fields.name: SHOCK
fields.description: Maximum duration of overthreshold event. Default value: 00

Tap/Wakeup.name: WAKE_UP_THS
Tap/Wakeup.description: Single and double-tap function threshold register (r/w)

fields.name: SINGLE_DOUBLE_TAP
fields.description: Single/double-tap event enable. Default: 0 (0: only single-tap event enabled; 1: both single and double-tap events enabled)

fields.name: INACTIVITY
fields.description: Inactivity event enable. Default value: 0 (0: sleep disabled; 1: sleep enabled)

fields.name: WK_THS
fields.description: Threshold for wakeup. Default value: 000000

Tap/Wakeup.name: WAKE_UP_DUR
Tap/Wakeup.description: Free-fall, wakeup, time stamp and sleep mode functions duration setting register (r/w)

fields.name: FF_DUR5
fields.description: Free fall duration event. Default: 0

fields.name: WAKE_DUR
fields.description: Wake up duration event. Default: 00

fields.name: TIMER_HR
fields.description: Time stamp register resolution setting. Default value: 0 (0: 1LSB = 6.4 ms; 1: 1LSB = 25 μs)

fields.name: SLEEP_DUR
fields.description: Duration to go in sleep mode. Default value: 0000

fields.name: FF_DUR
fields.description: Free-fall duration event. Default: 0

fields.name: FF_THS
fields.description: Free fall threshold setting. Default: 000
